sentences.arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى مَطَارِ مَسْقَطَ الدَّوْلِيِّ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ.
sentences.translation: Stigao sam na međunarodni aerodrom u Maskatu rano ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: I arrived at Muscat International Airport early in the morning.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الرِّحْلَةُ طَوِيلَةً وَلَكِنَّهَا مُرِيحَةٌ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Let je bio dug, ali veoma udoban.
sentences.translationEn: The flight was long but very comfortable.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى مَكْتَبِ الْجَوَازَاتِ لِأَخْتِمَ جَوَازَ سَفَرِي.
sentences.translation: Otišao sam do pasoške kontrole da mi udare pečat u pasoš.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the passport office to have my passport stamped.

sentences.arabic: ثُمَّ انْتَظَرْتُ حَقِيبَتِي عِنْدَ مَكَانِ اسْتِلَامِ الْأَمْتِعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zatim sam sačekao svoj kofer na mjestu za preuzimanje prtljaga.
sentences.translationEn: Then, I waited for my suitcase at the baggage claim area.

sentences.arabic: فِي النِّهَايَةِ، رَكِبْتُ سَيَّارَةَ أُجْرَةٍ لِلذَّهَابِ إِلَى الْفُنْدُقِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju sam ušao u taksi kako bih otišao do hotela.
sentences.translationEn: Finally, I took a taxi to go to the hotel.
